series_metadata.series_title: System Backups Production Data Files (mainframe systems environment)
series_metadata.series_description: The System Backups Production Data Files (mainframe systems environment) are copies of data files needed to restore a system in case of a disaster or inadvertent destruction. Does not include production databases or open systems data.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain daily backup, until the weekly backup is created on Sunday. Retain weekly backup for 4 weeks, and then destroy. Backup printers monthly to a compact disc (CD) and retain for 3 months, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete
